new_claims.claim_text: Trump threatened to cut off all trade with Spain in an early March 2026 clip recirculated in April.
new_claims.notes: Recirculation of older political rhetoric, potentially for misrepresentation.

new_claims.claim_text: Israel struck more than 200 Hezbollah sites in the past 24 hours.
new_claims.notes: Self-reported by party to conflict, requires independent verification.

new_claims.claim_text: Iran is unable to fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz because it cannot find all the mines it deployed.
President Trump says the US has begun the process of clearing out mines from the Strait of Hormuz.
new_claims.notes: Claim from KobeissiLetter, requires verification and context.
